injuries.comment: Kelly is battling an illness that will keep him out of practice Monday (Dec. 1).
Landeskog will miss practice Monday (Dec. 1) due to an illness.
MacKinnon is under the weather and won't practice Monday (Dec. 1).
The Avalanche announced that Brindley as week-to-week on Saturday (Nov. 22) and will be evaluated in a few weeks, per Evan Rawal of the Denver Gazette.
The Canucks said on Tuesday (Nov. 25) that Lankinen is stepping away from the team due to personal reasons.
Garland (upper body) has been ruled out for Tuesday's game against the Avalanche, Iain MacIntyre of Sportsnet reports.
